null_model: Signal-level IAAFT (shuffle raw signals, recompute WCC)
paradigm: All paradigms with threshold justification; report threshold metadata

null_model: Signal-level IAAFT (shuffle raw signals, recompute WCC)
paradigm: All paradigms; distribution shape, not temporal order

null_model: Exploratory in v1; validated timing/morphology existence null deferred to v2
